items.name_en: Exclusive Premium🔥Matte Wheat Gold/Antique Gold
items.name_cn:
Exclusive Premium🔥Matte Wheat Gold/Antique Gold
▪ROSE▪️Autumn/Winter New, Korean Celebrity Hobo!! The popular shoulder bag Y finally arrived!! The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured without being too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique vibe that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish👍
Model: 713938【Genuine Leather】
Size: 23x22x8cm

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Photos M24996 Screen Print (Surfing) This Christopher Medium Backpack uses Monogram Surfin' canvas inspired by Pharrell Williams, interpreting the inspiration of a rucksack. Surfboards and floral elements construct an intricate overlapping pattern, highlighting a retro atmosphere with vibrant tones. The close-fitting silhouette includes ample space, with compartments and side pockets. Dimensions: 38x44x12.5cm

items.name_en: Exclusive real shot m11461 (Summer)
items.name_cn:
Exclusive real shot m11461 (Summer)
This Pochette Métis Xph bag captures the vibrant tones and lively spirit of Monogram Tiles canvas, embellished with the LV Circle logo above the S-lock clasp. The academic bag structure features a top handle and a detachable long shoulder strap, suitable for shoulder and crossbody wear.
Size: 25 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_en: Exclusive Real Shot m12019
items.name_cn:
Exclusive Real Shot m12019
Inspired by the 1960s Knick-Knack handbag, this Lockit BB handbag offers flexible carrying options. The Monogram coated canvas features a curved top edge and oval trim, echoing classic elements of the original design. The padlock closure pays homage to the brand's long heritage.
Size: 15 x 19 x 7 cm

items.name_en: EXCURSION Backpack Series M46932# Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
EXCURSION Backpack Series M46932# Uninspected Version#
❐ Size: 21*23*10cm ❐
This compact and practical EXCURSION small backpack is made of Monogram canvas with leather trim, exuding a hiking spirit. The main compartment features an adjustable slider closure, and there are two buckle pockets on the front. In addition to the top handle, it also comes with a chain, allowing for free switching of carrying styles.

items.name_en: Export Product Milk White! Small Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Affinity Duma Backpack The hottest one is definitely Duma, extremely high popularity🆙, finally returned to the classic 25B series🌟🌟. The classic quilted pattern is on the zipper puller and leather drawstring. The material is still calf leather. The black-gold color scheme is versatile and premium√. The leather is glossy and shiny👅👅, and it is wear-resistant. No need to worry too much when using~ The bag shape is compact and powerful! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! Capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Size: 20X19 x12cm

items.name_en: Extra Large Size⭐️⭐️⭐️ WCHANEL 24P hobo Extra Large. This season's hobo is really popular!! They all look good. If you are relatively thin, you can press down the logo area. It feels like pressing down the center zipper would look better and more casual. Tall girls should go for it! The size is really suitable, and the leather is durable, perfect for autumn and winter. Sweet cool vibe~ Petite girls can consider the small size, it's also very nice! Details: Light gold hardware with shiny calfskin, very textured! Underarm carry, there is a Chanel small logo on the chain from the front, very detailed! This SA was really hesitant to buy it or snatch it from someone else. The last one because the caviar leather is very durable. Size: 35x 23 x 11cm Style AS 4246

items.name_en: Extraordinary Original Leather M24706 This Capucines East West mini bag is crafted from deeply dyed lambskin, featuring Monogram floral motifs and faux crystals integrated into the top handle. Dimensions: 22 × 12 × 8 cm
